Est. in Patiala
Our Story

Crafted with Passion
Inked with Precision

Game of Ink is Patiala's premier tattoo destination, built by artist Manav Verma whose relentless pursuit of detail has made every piece a masterpiece. From geometric realism to deeply personal tributes, every tattoo is a collaboration between artist and soul.

Located in the heart of Polo Ground Market, our studio is a sanctuary for art — hygienic, welcoming, and fully equipped with premium-grade equipment. Whether it's your first tattoo or your twentieth, we treat every client's skin as sacred canvas.

500+Tattoos Done
5★Google Rating
100%Custom Art
What We Do

Our Services

🎨

Custom Tattoo Design

Every design is created from scratch, tailored to your vision and personality. No flash, no templates — only original art drawn just for you.

Price on Consultation
🔱

Cover Up Tattoos

Transform old or unwanted ink into stunning new artwork. Our expertise in shading and composition ensures a seamless, powerful cover-up.

Price on Consultation
💠

Fine Line & Minimal

Delicate, precise linework for those who prefer understated elegance. Single needle and fine line techniques for timeless minimalist pieces.

Price on Consultation
🌈

Colour Tattoo

Vibrant, richly saturated colour work using top-grade pigments. From watercolour washes to bold neo-traditional palettes — we do it all.

Price on Consultation
📐

Fine Line Artwork

Architectural precision meets artistic vision. Geometric patterns, mandalas, and intricate fine-line compositions that age beautifully.

Price on Consultation
💎

Piercings

Professional body piercings with implant-grade jewellery. Ear, nose, and cartilage piercings in a sterile, safe environment by trained hands.

Price on Consultation

Why Your Feedback Matters

Every review helps us grow and helps new clients find us. At Game of Ink, we're committed to constant improvement and excellence in every piece we create.

You can also leave us a review directly on Google Maps to help others discover Patiala's finest tattoo studio.
